name: Color Swatches
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can implement color swatches on product cards to provide customers with an intuitive visual way to browse products by color, making it easier for them to find the specific variation they're looking for."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This visual enhancement helps improve product discoverability and can reduce the time customers spend searching for their preferred color options."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Color swatches create a more engaging shopping experience by displaying up to six color options directly on product cards, with an indicator showing when more colors are available. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By properly configuring color field mapping in your Merchant Dashboard and integrating the Liquid snippet, you enable customers to quickly identify product variations, which tends to enhance browsing efficiency and can help improve conversion rates."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Color swatches play a crucial role in enhancing the visual appeal and user experience of ecommerce platforms. They provide customers with a quick and intuitive way to browse products based on color preferences, facilitating easier navigation and informed purchase decisions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here\u2019s how to integrate Merchandising Cloud-powered color swatches within your Shopify store using our native Shopify app (built using Liquid)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Default Behavior"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When integrated, the Color Swatches component exhibits the following default behavior:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Hover Effect:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0On hover, the color name corresponding to the Merchandising Cloud color mapping is displayed."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Active Selection:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0Clicking on a color activates it, highlighting the selected option."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Display Limit:", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0A maximum of six color options are displayed initially. If there are more than six options, a little indicator is shown to prompt users to explore additional colors by opening the product."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Configuration"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before implementing the Color Swatches component, merchants must ensure proper configuration within their Merchandising Cloud dashboard."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow these steps:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Configure Color Field:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to Merchant Dashboard > Primary Settings > Filters."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Search for \"color\" and ensure it is configured to be returnable on search, autocomplete, and for variants and liquid."}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Configure ID Field:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Similar to the color field, ensure that the \"id\" field is configured to be returned for variants."}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Update Color Mapping:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "It is crucial to keep the color mapping updated. This mapping dictates which colors will be displayed. If a variant has a color that is not mapped, it will not be shown. This concept also applies to filters based on colors."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Integration with Liquid"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Color Swatches component is available as a Liquid snippet within the Findify Liquid Components ("}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-liquid-components/tree/main/snippets)", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "https://github.com/findify/findify-liquid-components/tree/main/snippets)"}]}, {"text": " repository."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Since you've already imported all the files from this repository, including findify-product-swatches-color.liquid and findify-product-swatches.css, you don't need to download them again. Simply ensure that both of these snippets are included within your theme's snippets directory, particularly within findify-head-injector.liquid."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Confirm Snippets:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "The Color Swatches component is available as a Liquid snippet within the\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-liquid-components/tree/main/snippets", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Liquid Components GitHub repository"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Ensure that both 'findify-product-swatches-color.liquid' and 'findify-product-swatches.css' snippets are included within your theme's snippets directory, particularly within 'findify-head-injector.liquid'."}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Modify\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": ":"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Locate the file\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0within your theme's sections directory."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Uncomment the following code snippet to display Color Swatches:"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "jsx"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{% render 'findify-product-swatches-color', product_url: product_url, product: product, colormap: colormap, variants: Enhance the visual appeal, navigation, and user experience of your ecommerce platform, thereby driving engagement and boosting sales."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us on\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
